name: Iowa Applesauce Cake
recipeInstructions:
Cake: In a large mixing bowl, beat the butter (or margarine) and sugar for 30 seconds. Add the egg; beat until combined. Stir together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, and cloves. Alternately add the flour mixture with applesauce to the butter mixture, stirring after each addition. Fold in raisins and nuts. Pour batter into a greased 13 x 9 x 2 inch baking pan, spreading evenly. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean. Cool in the pan on a wire rack.
Cream Cheese Frosting: Beat together the cream cheese, butter (or margarine), and vanilla until light and fluffy. Gradually beat in powdered sugar until smooth. Add more powdered sugar if needed to make a spreadable frosting.
